title: Warm up
content: Images of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each demonstrating unique features. These visuals likely depict key elements or themes associated with each city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide title suggests a focus on China's development. The imagery likely illustrates facets of cultural and urban growth within the nation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session involves investigating and researching cities. It emphasizes identifying local features, development strategies, and their positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Each city is paired with a development strategy: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide presents development strategies through taxi drivers' perspectives. Strategies include sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration.
key_claims: An evolving nation and unique development strategies
Each city develops strategies based on local features to promote city development
